plugins.name: research-to-paper
plugins.description: Self-contained research-writing pipeline: scope a direction (with target-journal requirements), build a DOI-verified literature library (Zotero/EndNote RIS + BibTeX + by-category Excel), draft with evidence-matched hedging, run a multi-agent adversarial review, de-AI the prose (long-short sentence variation), and render LaTeX/Word/PDF. Depends on no other skill.
